Send a push notification

Compose and send a push notification to all subscribers in your network

{% uj_icon "plus", "fa-md me-2" %} Create Notification
{% uj_icon "circle-info", "fa-md me-2 mt-1" %}
About push notifications

Push notifications are delivered in real-time via Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM). Users subscribe to notifications through their browser, and delivery is managed by FCM. Notification history is not stored — each notification is sent once and delivered directly to subscriber devices.
